mapper.insert: insert into music (cover_images, music_name, singer_name, music_desc, album_title, release_date, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) values (#{music.coverImages}, #{music.musicName}, #{music.singerName}, #{music.musicDesc}, #{music.albumTitle}, #{music.releaseDate}, #{music.createTime}, #{music.updateTime}, #{music.isDeleted})
mapper.update: update music set cover_images=#{music.coverImages}, music_name=#{music.musicName}, singer_name=#{music.singerName}, music_desc=#{music.musicDesc}, album_title=#{music.albumTitle}, release_date=#{music.releaseDate}, update_time=#{music.updateTime}, is_deleted=#{music.isDeleted} where id = #{music.id}
